title: Debug and fix persistent admin access denial for authenticated owner

requirements.text: Add extensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to output: 1) the raw caller principal from Principal.toText(caller), 2) the raw owner principal from Principal.toText(ownerPrincipal), 3) the exact boolean result of the equality comparison, 4) any intermediate conversion or comparison steps
acceptanceCriteria: Backend isCallerAdmin method logs the caller principal as text
Backend isCallerAdmin method logs the owner principal as text
Backend logs the boolean result of principal equality comparison
Logs are visible in the deployment console output

requirements.text: Verify the owner principal initialization in backend/main.mo by adding logging during canister initialization that outputs: 1) whether an admin token was provided in init args, 2) the exact principal text extracted from the admin token, 3) confirmation that ownerPrincipal variable was set
acceptanceCriteria: Canister initialization logs whether admin token was received
Initialization logs the extracted owner principal text if token was provided
Logs confirm ownerPrincipal variable was successfully assigned
Logs are visible during canister deployment

requirements.text: Add frontend console logging in the App.tsx admin route that outputs: 1) the exact isAdmin boolean value returned from the backend call, 2) the type of the isAdmin value (typeof isAdmin), 3) the result of explicit boolean checks (isAdmin === true, isAdmin === false), 4) any error objects if the backend call fails
acceptanceCriteria: Admin route logs the isAdmin value and its type
Admin route logs explicit boolean comparison results
Admin route logs any errors from the backend call
Logs appear in browser console when accessing /admin route

requirements.text: Review the backend actor initialization arguments and canister deployment configuration to verify the admin token containing principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' is being passed correctly during deployment
acceptanceCriteria: Deployment configuration includes admin token parameter
Admin token matches the authenticated user's principal
Canister receives the admin token during initialization
Owner principal is correctly set from the admin token

constraints: Do not modify the single-actor backend architecture
Preserve all existing admin authentication logic while adding diagnostics
Maintain all existing frontend routing and authentication patterns
nonGoals: Adding new backend methods beyond debugging enhancements
